Banzai Kids Summertime Inflatable Swimming Arm Floaties Pool Floats

Help your little one get used to the swimming this summer with these inflatable arm float wings. These blow up swim sleeves provide comfortable safety for kids as they learn to swim. The arm bands are orange for high visibility and include a repair patch.

Key Features

  • CHILD SIZED - For Ages 3-5 Ideal for Young Children
  • INCLUDES REPAIR KIT - Vinyl Plastic Repairs Holes & Punctures - No Need to Worry About Rips & Tears
  • PROMOTES EXERCISE - Teach Children how to Swim Safely
  • HIGH VISIBILITY - Spot your splashing child from a distance in these orange swimming floaty wings
